game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Crumble is a dynamic physics platformer. Move like a Slime, jump like a ball, swing like Spiderman! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1061180/Crumble/ --game_index 55511 --config configs/generators/threejs_gen.yaml --model google:gemini-3-pro-preview ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Crumble is a dynamic physics platformer. Move like a Slime, jump like a ball, swing like Spiderman! Wishlist and follow the development of my upcoming game:


Crumble is a physics platformer with a grappling tongue mechanic.
Join the chaos of unstable platforms and unexpected destructions with this cute blue ball!
Try to progress in exciting levels falling around you.
Move like a Slime, jump like a Ball, swing like Spiderman!

Features

  • A campaign mode with an increasingly crumbling world
  • A multiplayer Party Mode up to 4 local players
  • Unlock new skins
  • Online leader boards
  • High dynamic physics

Vibrant Environment

Crumbling Chaos

Swing Mechanics
game_info.description: Navigate your bouncy blue ball through crumbling platforms to reach the goal! Use your grappling tongue to swing across gaps and climb to safety. Platforms decay over time and fall away, so keep moving! Collect stars for bonus points and master the physics-based movement to complete increasingly challenging levels.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Space: Jump
Z: Launch grappling tongue (aim automatically toward nearest anchor point)
Hold Z: Maintain grapple and swing
Release Z: Detach from grapple

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement, jumping, and platform collision detection. Verify that the player can move smoothly, jump reliably, and land on platforms without clipping through.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move left and right alternately, performing jumps at regular intervals. Test jumping from stationary position and while moving. Verify landing on platforms at different heights.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly in both directions, jump consistently with proper arc, and land solidly on all platforms. No clipping through platforms or getting stuck. Test is successful when all basic movement is responsive and collision detection is accurate.

TEST_1.strategy: Move left and right alternately, performing jumps at regular intervals. Test jumping from stationary position and while moving. Verify landing on platforms at different heights.
TEST_1.expected: Player should move smoothly in both directions, jump consistently with proper arc, and land solidly on all platforms. No clipping through platforms or getting stuck. Test is successful when all basic movement is responsive and collision detection is accurate.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the grappling hook mechanics including tongue launch, swinging physics, and detachment. Verify that grappling points are reachable and swing momentum is realistic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically target each grapple point in the level. Launch grapple, maintain connection while swinging, then release at optimal points. Test grappling from various positions and velocities.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Grapple should successfully connect to anchor points, create visible tongue line, apply proper swing physics with momentum conservation, and detach cleanly. Test succeeds when player can reliably use grapple to traverse gaps and reach elevated platforms.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing platform crumbling mechanics and timing. Verify that platforms decay properly, fall realistically, and create appropriate game pressure without being unfair.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Stand on various platforms and observe decay timers. Move between platforms at different speeds to test the pacing. Intentionally wait on platforms to trigger crumbling.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Platforms should show visual decay indicators, crumble after appropriate time, and fall with physics. Player should have reasonable time to react. Test passes when crumbling creates challenge without feeling cheap.

TEST_3.expected: Platforms should show visual decay indicators, crumble after appropriate time, and fall with physics. Player should have reasonable time to react. Test passes when crumbling creates challenge without feeling cheap.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing collectible star pickup and scoring system. Verify that stars are collectible, scoring updates correctly, and all stars can be reached using available movement options.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate the level collecting all visible stars. Use combination of jumping and grappling to reach stars in difficult positions. Verify score increments with each collection.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: All stars should be reachable and collectible. Score should increment correctly. Stars should have clear visual feedback on collection. Test succeeds when all stars can be collected and scoring is accurate.
TEST_4.description: Testing collectible star pickup and scoring system. Verify that stars are collectible, scoring updates correctly, and all stars can be reached using available movement options.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing win condition by reaching the goal platform. Verify that goal is clearly marked, reachable through intended paths, and triggers proper game completion state.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Navigate through the level using optimal path to reach the goal platform as quickly as possible. Test both direct approach and alternative routes. Verify goal collision detection.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Goal platform should be clearly visible and distinguishable. Upon reaching goal, game should transition to win state showing completion message and final score. Test passes when goal is reachable and triggers correct end state.
TEST_5.description: Testing win condition by reaching the goal platform. Verify that goal is clearly marked, reachable through intended paths, and triggers proper game completion state.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing lose condition by falling off the bottom of the screen. Verify that falling below visible area triggers game over appropriately.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Intentionally fall off platforms and miss grapple attempts to fall below the screen. Test from various heights and positions.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Falling below a death threshold should trigger game over state. Player should see game over screen with option to restart. Test succeeds when lose condition is fair and clearly communicated.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing complete optimal playthrough combining all mechanics. Verify that a skilled player can complete the level efficiently using advanced techniques.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Execute optimal movement combining running jumps, strategic grappling, and platform navigation. Collect stars efficiently while maintaining momentum. Reach goal quickly while platforms crumble.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: An optimal playthrough should be possible using all mechanics in combination. Movement should feel fluid and rewarding. Test succeeds when the level can be completed smoothly with good score in reasonable time.
TEST_7.description: Testing complete optimal playthrough combining all mechanics. Verify that a skilled player can complete the level efficiently using advanced techniques.
